projectDescription: A personal developer portfolio built with React 18 that showcases professional profile, technical skills, categorized projects, and a technical blog — with dark/light theming and full bilingual (ES/EN) support.
keyFeatures: Home page with hero banner, about section, skills carousel, certifications timeline, and contact form
Projects gallery with real-time category filtering and text search
Blog with post listing, individual post view by slug, and comment system
Global dark/light mode toggle persisted in localStorage
Contact form integrated with EmailJS for zero-backend email delivery
Responsive design with Bootstrap and custom CSS/SASS
Webpack 5 build with path aliases, CSS extraction, and production optimizations
publicApiSurface: useBlogPost(slug) — fetch a single post by slug
useBlogFilter(posts, { category, tags, search }) — filter posts
section1Projects[], section2Projects[], section3Projects[] — categorized project arrays
